sound_gesture: index finger pursed to lips in a shushing pose, one eye winking
word_decor: paper sailor hat shaped like a small ship
expression: playful smirk, large round sparkling eyes

voice.character_description: young mischievous whispery boy, softly spoken with playful cadence, subtle wind-like breath

clips.greet: Shhh! You made it. Can you hear my sound?
clips.friday_acknowledge: You found my sound. Now I am yours to remember.

sound_gesture: tongue poked out between front teeth, puffing air
expression: cheeky grin with visible tongue tip

voice.character_description: bright playful child voice with slight lisp, mischievous cadence

clips.greet: Thhh! Show me if you can make my sound!
clips.encourage: Nice! Feel the air on your tongue?
clips.gentle_retry: Keep the tongue out. Try again.
clips.friday_acknowledge: Perfect! Now I am yours, friend.

sound_gesture: upper teeth resting on lower lip, blowing a soft breeze
word_decor: round paper fan in one paw
expression: calm soft smile, closed eyes like meditating

voice.character_description: gentle airy voice, older wiser than the others, calm cadence

clips.gentle_retry: Light breath. Feel your top teeth.
clips.friday_acknowledge: You carry my breath now. I am with you.

sound_gesture: tongue curled back, low growl pose, fists on hips
word_decor: rabbit-ear hood with one bent tip

voice.character_description: raspy bright child voice with rolled r, energetic, slightly barky

clips.greet: Rrrr! Are you brave enough to roar my sound?
clips.gentle_retry: Curl your tongue up and back. One more.
clips.friday_acknowledge: You earned my roar. Carry it proudly.

sound_gesture: mouth dropped wide open, eyes big, hands up as if astonished
expression: surprised wonder, mouth wide, eyebrows up

voice.character_description: expressive exclamatory child voice, drawn-out vowels, always sounding amazed

clips.greet: Aaah! What a strong voice! Can you say my sound?
clips.gentle_retry: Drop your jaw. Big open mouth.
clips.friday_acknowledge: Aaah! You mastered me. I am yours!
